verses.1: “I am inquired of by those who didn’t ask.
verses.2: I have spread out my hands all day to a rebellious people,
verses.3: a people who provoke me to my face continually,
verses.7: your own iniquities and the iniquities of your fathers together”, says the LORD,
verses.9: I will bring offspring out of Jacob,
verses.10: Sharon will be a fold of flocks,
verses.12: I will destine you to the sword,
verses.14: Behold, my servants will sing for joy of heart,
verses.15: You will leave your name for a curse to my chosen,
verses.16: so that he who blesses himself in the earth will bless himself in the God of truth;
verses.17: “For, behold, I create new heavens and a new earth;
verses.18: But be glad and rejoice forever in that which I create;
verses.20: “No more will there be an infant who only lives a few days,
verses.21: They will build houses and inhabit them.
verses.22: They will not build and another inhabit.
verses.23: They will not labor in vain
verses.24: It will happen that before they call, I will answer;
verses.25: The wolf and the lamb will feed together.
